## Appointments

::: {.appointment}
**2023–Present** — **Assistant Professor**

Department of Human Development and Family Studies, Penn State University

**Affiliations:** Social Science Research Institute (SSRI); Geroscience Consortium, Center for Healthy Aging
:::

::: {.appointment}
**2020–2023** — **Assistant Professor**

Department of Psychology, Human Factors and Cognitive Psychology Program, University of Central Florida
:::
